prompt: A highly detailed photorealistic LEGO diorama of the Alhambra in Granada, shown as an ornate Moorish courtyard at golden-hour sunset. The scene is built entirely from LEGO bricks and minifigure parts, with warm amber light, cinematic depth, and rich texture. Center the composition on a long narrow reflective water channel leading toward 1 small round fountain in the middle distance and a grand horseshoe arch beyond it. Surround the courtyard with intricate tan stone-like LEGO walls, carved-looking geometric relief patterns, slender columns, tiled archways, and terracotta rooflines made from densely layered reddish-brown pieces. In the background, include 2 main towers and several additional palace structures rising behind the courtyard, plus 6 tall dark green cypress trees silhouetted against a glowing orange sky. Add blue, green, and white mosaic-style tile details around the central arch and lower walls. Populate the courtyard with exactly 9 LEGO tourists and visitors: 1 traveler in a tan hat and light outfit, 1 visitor in a blue jacket beside them, 1 person with a green backpack at the left foreground, 1 photographer holding a camera in the left foreground, 1 kneeling visitor examining the garden at the right edge of the water channel, 2 standing visitors chatting in the right midground, and 2 seated visitors on a tiled bench in the right foreground. Frame the water channel with low manicured hedges and small pink flowers. Use a low eye-level perspective from the start of the reflecting pool, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the central courtyard, glossy water reflections, realistic LEGO stud texture, and a mood that feels majestic, playful, and museum-quality.
